amendment.description: To require voters to provide photo identification.

action.text: Cloture on amendment SA 4732 not invoked in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 53 - 47. Record Vote Number: 73.
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Cloture motion on amendment SA 4732, to the motion to concur in the House message to accompany S. 1383 with amendment SA 4420, presented in Senate.
Amendment SA 4732 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Husted to Amendment SA 4420.
Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Cloture on amendment SA 4732 not invoked in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 53 - 47. Record Vote Number: 73.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4732 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Husted to Amendment SA 4420.
